title: Amortized Analysis and Dynamic Structures · Invariant Lens: Aggregate Method
summary: Guarantee long-run latency for a structure with occasional expensive rebuilds. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 aggregate method increment in an amortized-cost ledger and implementation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bound total operation cost over a sequence and derive amortized cost.
Argue comparison or information lower bounds without confusing them with one implementation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
